message:
chore(deps): holistic library-updater pass — closes Dependabot #84-#88

Sweeps every outdated cargo dep into a single coherent update set,
replacing five pending Dependabot PRs with one tested commit.

Compatible (cargo update):
- assert_cmd, clap, clap_complete (#87), insta, libc (#84), open (#85),
  proptest, rayon, toml, tokio, tru, uuid, wide
- transitive: serde, serde_json, syn, regex, hyper-rustls, etc.

Major bumps with code impact:
- rand 0.9.2 → 0.10.1 (#88) and rand_distr 0.5.1 → 0.6.0:
  random_range moved from Rng to RngExt trait. Switched two import sites
  (cli/commands/experiment.rs, core/recovery.rs).
- tantivy 0.25.0 → 0.26.1 (#86):
  TopDocs no longer impls Collector directly — must call
  .order_by_score() (or .order_by(...)) to get a Collector. Updated two
  search-call sites in src/search/tantivy.rs.
- sha2 0.10.9 → 0.11.0:
  finalize() returns hybrid_array::Array instead of GenericArray;
  no LowerHex impl, and Sha256 no longer implements std::io::Write.
  Switched 3 sites from format!("{:x}", ...) to hex::encode(...) and
  rewrote compute_sha256() in updater/mod.rs to use a manual read loop
  instead of std::io::copy.
- lru 0.14 → 0.17 (3 majors): no API impact at our usage sites.

Verification:
- cargo build --workspace: clean
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets: warnings only (style suggestions)
- cargo test --workspace: 3264 passed / 107 failed / 35 ignored — exact
  match to pre-update baseline. The 107 failures are pre-existing
  environment/concurrency tests (beads concurrent_tests, MCP ANSI
  validation, output detection, auto_load_workflow integration tests),
  unaffected by these dep bumps.

Deferred:
- vergen-gix 1.0.9 → 9.1.0: declared as build-dep but no build.rs exists,
  so it currently does nothing. Bumping the lockfile without an exercising
  build.rs gives no signal — left for whichever change actually wires it
  in.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
